series_metadata.series_title: Information Resources Management and Data Processi
series_metadata.series_description: Agency IT plans, data processing services plans, strategic plans, and related records used to plan for information systems development, technology acquisitions, data processing services provision, or related areas

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then scan to electronic form for permanent retention. Then review by State Archives prior to disposal. (see OCC-PP-02) ; Electronic: Retain permanently, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Permanent
